original_image_tags: newspaper clipping from an unidentified publication.

elements.description: A yellowed newspaper clipping with the headline 'NOTHING REMOTELY RELATED' and subheadline 'Mysterious Object Amazes Saucer Skeptic'. The text describes a sighting by Capt. W. J. Hull near Mobile, Ala. A small sidebar text box mentions 'The UFO Investigator' and the 'National Investigations Committee on Aerial Phenomena'. No graphical illustrations are visible within the clipping itself.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a newspaper clipping, but Description B adds specific visual details (headline, subheadline, sidebar text) that Description A omits, without contradicting the core visual element.
